JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT WEAVER - RPT, MARILYN NORMAN - CLERK, GUY DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/GILBERT JAY AS COUN- SEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2349 NORTH POINT ST, S.F, CA. - $12,204 PRINCIPAL - $2,500 ATTY FEES - DEF. RECEIVES $2,900 CREDIT BY FORF. SEC. DEP. LEAVING TOTAL OWING OF $11,804 - WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVIC- TION STAYED TO 2-1-97 - IF DEFS. VACATE PREMISES & LEAVE IT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION ON 1-31-97 & PD. $11,804 OWED, PL. WILL MOVE TO S/A JUDGMENT & DISM W/PREJUDICE. IF DEF. VA- CATES BEFORE 1-31-97, DEF. WILL BE CREDITED W/THE APPROPRI- ATE REDUCTION ON THE $11,804 OWING. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
